description: Retroactive enrichment of HubSpot companies missing the country property. Processes 10 companies per run (testing). Classification priority: (1) domain TLD, (2) Amplemarket LinkedIn data, (3) Gemini website scraping. Unresolved companies are flagged via Slack for manual review.

hubspotProperties.countryenrichmentsource: Audit: Domain code | Linkedin | Website | Manual review
